emails.subject: Re: Associate/Analyst Super Saturday Participation
emails.body: Re: Associate/Analyst Super Saturday Participation Just curious how I may assist in getting Auburn University's name added to recruiting endeavors. Of course I am an alum, and I believe you will find we have an excellent engineering and business school. Just curious, thanks. PL

emails.subject: Re: Associate/Analyst Super Saturday Participation
emails.body: Phillip this fall is nearing it's end for recruiting. Schools are selected by an executive committee and program management. I suggest that early next spring, you contact Celeste Roberts and discuss your request with her. Celeste is my Director, however she is out on maternity leave at this time. Thank you Shelly Phillip M Love 10/11/2000 07:41 AM
